basic_details.job_title: TMC Specialist Senior Resident / Senior Resident / Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.post_name: Specialist Senior Resident / Senior Resident / Medical Officer
basic_details.short_information: The Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) has officially announced the Specialist Senior Resident / Senior Resident / Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was released under Advertisement No. VAR/ACA/19/2026 on the official TMC website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 45 years (with applicable relaxation for reserved categories) and hold qualifications such as M.Ch./Dr. NB (Pediatric Surgery), M.S./DNB (General Surgery), or MBBS recognized by the National Medical Commission (NMC) are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 28 May 2026 to 15 June 202

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 45 years (Relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC & 10 years for Physically Handicapped)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, and 10 years for Physically Handicapped candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M. Ch / Dr. NB (Pediatric Surgery) OR M.S./D.N.B. General Surgery OR M.B.B.S. Degree, recognized by NMC.
qualification.details: Specialist Senior Resident: M. Ch / Dr. NB (PEDIATRIC SURGERY) RECOGNIZED BY NMC. Oncology experience preferred. Senior Resident: M.S./D.N.B. GENERAL SURGERY RECOGNIZED BY NMC. Oncology experience preferred. Medical Officer: M.B.B.S. DEGREE RECOGNIZED BY NMC. Oncology experience preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: Specialist Senior Resident: ₹ 1,45,530/-, Senior Resident: ₹ 1,33,623/-, Medical Officer: ₹ 1,11,132/-
salary_details.specialist senior resident: ₹ 1,45,530/- (Rupees One Lakh Forty-Five Thousand Five Hundred Thirty only)
salary_details.senior resident: ₹ 1,33,623/- (Rupees One Lakh Thirty-Three Thousand Six Hundred Twenty-Three only)
salary_details.medical officer: ₹ 1,11,132/- (Rupees One Lakh Eleven Thousand One Hundred Thirty-Two only)
